name: AI Dashboard
description: Provides a dashboard for AI modules and features.
consumes_plugin_types: dashboard Dashboard config entity — ships core.dashboard entity 'ai_dashboard' laid out with Layout Builder that renders at /admin/config/ai
Core Block (@Block) — defines 5 blocks (ai_setup_ai_provider, admin_menu_links, module_list_packages, ai_operations_status, ai_documentation) placed on the dashboard
project_browser ProjectBrowserSource (#[ProjectBrowserSource]) — provides the 'ai_dashboard_recommended' source (curated remote list of recommended AI recipes)
ai AiProvider (@AiProvider) — the Setup block and AiSetupStatus service read AI Core's provider plugins and config
config_action (setupAiProvider / simpleConfigUpdate) — the Setup form applies these to store a provider API key
